S.FORM: Marcus Banks sraral hya ga si syuw na NBA, wal malax misu qaniy la. kawas tay 1981, ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 11, Marcus Banks, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita sa brbiru Lists of National Basketball Association players
